title: DIGITAL TECHNOLOGIES AND THE TRANSFORMATION OF TRADITIONAL ETHICAL NORMS
author: Inomxo'jayeva Sanobarxon Muxammadixonovna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article examines the transformation of traditional ethical norms within the context of digital technologies. The research contributes to understanding the dynamic relationship between technological progress and ethical evolution, suggesting that traditional values undergo reinterpretation rather than complete abandonment in digital contexts.
steps_raw: This article examines the transformation of traditional ethical norms within the context of digital technologies. The research contributes to understanding the dynamic relationship between technological progress and ethical evolution, suggesting that traditional values undergo reinterpretation rather than complete abandonment in digital contexts.
